title: Verify every external-orchestrator operation contract
preconditions: Published executable, a schema-driven provider-neutral client, compatible and incompatible contract versions, and any bundled optional agent guidance.
steps: Enumerate operation descriptors; invoke help and schemas; scan for forbidden provider fields; exercise success and every declared expected-error class through JSON input; run compatibility and lost-output replay cases; compare stdout, stderr, exits, and optional guidance manifests.
expected: Every public operation has deterministic provider-neutral schema, help, compatibility and idempotency metadata; one structured result; safe diagnostics; documented exits; no channel fields; incompatible versions fail before writes; core workflows require no agent-specific skill.
